div.h2: Architectural Specification: Instruction Stream & Control Flow
div.p: Target VM: Stack-based Virtual Machine (v1.0) Pattern: WHILE (condition) { body } Mechanism: Relative Offset Backward Branching Instruction Width: 32-bit (Fixed Length)
1. Condition Pipeline: The cond_eval block performs a destructive stack comparison. OP_GREATER_THAN consumes two stack elements and pushes a boolean integer (0 or 1).
2. Conditional Branching: JUMP_IF_FALSE (0x0C) is a relative forward jump. If the condition is not met, the Instruction Pointer (IP) is incremented by the operand value to skip the loop body.
3. Reification of the Loop: The JUMP_ABSOLUTE (0x20) instruction at the end of the body creates the cycle by explicitly setting the IP back to the header address (0x00).
